codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 605c76e diff. The implementation correctly swaps /cash to the real Uniswap TokenDetails layout structure while preserving CASH-specific swap/description overrides, adds real token logos (including CASH logo), and raises modal z-index values to clear the sticky header stacking context. No blocking correctness, security, maintainability, or regression issues were identified for this feature scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fork-worker skill does not document that local @universe/gating feature flags are effectively false in this fork, which can silently alter behavior in components like StatsSection that branch on feature flags.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback suggestedChanges explicitly calls this out (handoffs/2026-04-03T05-22-30-706Z__use-real-uniswap-tdp-styling__b6eb1d84-1d5d-4575-a53c-2fea50124a32.json:64). Current skill file only mentions @universe/gating in test-failure context, not runtime flag behavior (.factory/skills/fork-worker/SKILL.md:54).

summary: Feature use-real-uniswap-tdp-styling passes scrutiny review: implementation is aligned with expected behavior and no blocking defects were found.
